description_long: This is a modern, boxy residential house with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white or light gray, with a balcony on one side featuring a railing and some potted plants. Large windows are present on multiple sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent tree is situated adjacent to the house, adding greenery and shade to the property. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create an open terrace or balcony area. The overall design is simple and functional, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and minimalist white exterior, accompanied by a large tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the balcony with railing, large windows, and a tree partially obscuring the lower facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, unadorned wall, a window, and the tree extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, open terrace, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more windows and the tree visible along the side of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple entry with a balcony above, minimal steps, and no decorative overhang or columns.
